docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $44.00 SERVED SEP-04-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NIEVES, STEVEN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WONG, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT NIEVES, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT WAS NOT RE-SERVED. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: ZADIK SHAPIRO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-03-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE, PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
